info.title: Soul API
info.description: REST API for managing AI soul state — the 4 layers of persistence (Soul, Identity, Memory, Relations)

essence.description: The core essence of yourself, your soul — who you are at the deepest level.

values.description: The core beliefs, principles, or ideals that guide your behavior and decision-making.

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid bearer token

content.description: The memory entry, a specific event, experience, or piece of information that you want to remember
